further_info: HP-F12: Immunological Methods Type: Practical Course with Student Seminars Date: 8 June - 1 July 2026 Location: DKFZ Teaching Lab and various DKFZ division labs and seminar room (details will be announced to participants) Hosts/Supervisors: Stefan Eichmüller, Martina Seiffert (responsible organizers); Ana Stojanovic, Angelika Riemer, Ed Green, Elias Amro, Felix Hartmann, Franziska Blaeschke, Gemma Hartley, Ilka Wahl, Isabel Poschke, Lukas Bunse, Nikolaus Dietlein, Nina Papavasiliou, Thorsten Feyerabend, Viktor Umansky, Robin Thiele, Veit Buchholz, Vincenz Buschinger, and other colleagues
